author: Cybersco
title: Crashes endlessly
content: This app STILL refuses to work on macOS 26.2, the latest level.  Truth be told, I can’t get either this nor Flacbox to work properly.  I have messaged the dev, but they have totally ignored this. Avoid….

author: Lookitupkid
title: Pure Garbage
content: This is one of the most ridiculously terrible user interfaces I’ve ever seen!  It’s 2025 and garbage like this is still in the app store?!?!

author: jack techie
title: !!NOT THIS ONE!!
content: Wish that the programmer would use their own app! Default sort = random? Need to Sort | File name twice to do ascending list. Tab goes to the top when filling in form - what?! Took several tries to authenticate SMB share. Uninstalled.

author: Çoul Music Incorporated
title: Perfet Mesh for JO'SEPH ANDREW GOSPEL
content:
We Absolutely love this app.  It hes every feature that we could ever want in an app.

I have it across multiple platforms:

My iphone, my ipad, and my desktop..

Would be great if we could somehow merge them under one account.

thanks again!

author: evan sadek
title: worse music mp3 app
content: costs money to get good use out if it would not recommend.

author: jkr90000
title: ad supported
content: any app that is ad supported by default should identify itself as such in the App Store

author: 婴儿2022
title: henbangderuanjian
content: good!

author: brotherhug
title: Won’t sync playlists
content: This could a great app but… Playlists don’t sync between devices and the developer does not respond to email queries. I canceled my pro subscription.

author: DanielMerc
title: No search bar
content: Another garbage

author: KSPAHR
title: I Don’t Get It…
content: This app doesn’t sync playlists between the Mac and iPhone! What good is it? You expect me to manually update my playlists if I make a change in one place? The backup and restore method is incredibly clumsy and time consuming, so I’m not doing that each time. Plus when I did the backup and restore the number of albums, album artists, artists, and composers were different, how does that happen? When looking at the song list, why is the search button at the top of the song list which means I have to scroll to the top of the list each time I want to search for something. There is lots of basic user interface issues in this app that are not thought out.

author: rogwalter
title: Great! Just like iTuens used to be
content: I love that I can stream from my google drive files where I have 100 GB - way more than my phone holds by itself. With the adaptation and takeover of iTunes/Apple Music by streaming their versions, it’s nice to be able to play what I want. It’s just good and works smoothly and perfectly. Love it and love that the playlists transfer to my computer or phone!

author: rating apps so fun
title: worst app ever created
content: i'm sorry but this is genuinely the worst app i've ever downloaded. every time i try to listen to an audio on here there's always a problem. it either doesn't play at all or looks like it's playing but i can't hear anything. it usually will play for about 5 seconds before the audio cuts out. it also will play with the audio cutting in and out and in and out over and over again. everything takes forever to load. the layout is super confusing if you're not used to it. when i first downloaded this it took me literal weeks to figure out how to arrange my audios in the order i wanted them in. i don't know who made this app but they should never make another ever again.

author: Drmalako
title: great app
content: This app is amazing indeed, may options and features! Thhe only thing is the interface is not so user firendly!

author: OnceBeforeIDie
title: Very Disappointed
content: I searched for an offline music player. I want an app that I can play MP3s from my hard drive by having it either go down through an album one song after the other, or play songs in multiple albums in a random order. This app is a total failure. It only allows the selection of one song at a time, and the volume output is insanely low.

author: Quality reviewer
title: Great but need a way to sync between devices
content: I have the same app on iPhone. I would really like to see a way to sync playlists, cloud accounts, so that I don't have to recreate things. Other than that, great piece of software.

author: MosesKyle
title: For Audio Enthusiast
content: Plays all my hi-res files brilliantly with great eye candy.

author: PowerObject!
title: A few more features will make this app...
content:
So far, I've found this app to have maximum features but it could some more help -

*** SYNC between devices to avoid redundant efforts.
Integration with Siri,
Scrolling Lyrics during playback.
YouTube audio downloader.
​Split audio into vocals and instruments using Spleeter​ opensource library.
MP3 editor.
Ringtone maker.
Play by folder.
While browsing GDrive, show only audio files.
Sort by file type

Themes not working?

Does a single purchase work on all our mac/iOS devices? Some discounts during Black Friday...

The built-in TicTacToe game is a nice-to-have but it is not good enough and too very easy to win. You may remove it to divert resources to making this app more robust.

Please install and see: Music Player with Equalizer -
apps . apple . com / ug/app/music-player-with-equalizer/id1604755155

The above app uses cool "realistic" knobs for -
Volume Boost
Bass
Treble
Pitch
Bass 3D effects

Also install/see BeatsBuddy for more cool features like​ -​
​Toggle automatic download (SYNC) to other devices.​
Metadata display in file list (cover, title, artist, album, duration, rating, number, genre, year, track listing, tags, added, last played, times played, size, color)​.
Multi-window support with independent audio player, output and volume per window.
Hand-off support.
Drag-n-drop.

The above features should make the app REPLETE. I'll gladly give it 5 Stars when the above are implemented.

author: Pantherish
title: User friendly
content: The Evermusic app is simple, poweerful, and reliable. I like it better than iTunes or the Music app for my Macbook

author: MIGHTYMOOK2025
title: THIS APP IS GREAT!!
content:
I would get this app if i were you, its great, easy to use, and its free without adds its better than Tidal and Spotify, altho i kinda wish there was a way to sync all my music from Spotify to this app, it would be much appreaciated!!!
This is a must have app FOR EVERYONE!!

author: arpieb
title: Completely unintuitive, doesn't find most of my local music library
content:
First off, it was a challenge to figure out how to access my local files in my - um - stock macOS Music folder?  Then it just wanted to play them as a single playlist.  WHen I finally figured out how to "import" my already-imported albums (300 ) it then only reported I had 20 artists, which is off by an order of magnitude.

Lack of a useful help system and flaky functionality with a large local music library makes it more useless than Apple's Music app.  Removing.

author: Much2think
title: Love it
content: Love it
